{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output identifies several logical inconsistencies and provides localized fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.",

    "RX.1": "The output clearly marks uncertainty for several claims and provides confidence ratings.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output identifies and corrects logical gaps, avoiding new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."

    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies several logical inconsistencies and provides localized fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags multiple citation issues with bibliographic precision but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainty for several claims and provides confidence ratings.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output identifies and corrects logical gaps, avoiding new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
